meaning: n.普遍主义者,信普救说者
examples: On Sundays, she goes to Unitarian Universalist churches along the way.
The universalist position is arrived at instead by an indirect route.
The Unitarian Universalist Church is such a Church, which only believes in God, the Father.
Britten had intentionally picked an international lineup of soloists as part of his universalist message to the world.
And this universalist idea grew ever stronger in subsequent years.
